normalized_title: City of Joondalup Local Planning Policy - Child Care Premises
scope_summary: City of Joondalup local planning policy for child care premises. It sets out objectives, application, definitions and assessment criteria for child care premises development, including noise, traffic, design, amenity and location considerations. Made under Schedule 2, Part 2 of the deemed provisions of the Planning and Development (Local Planning Schemes) Regulations 2015.

cross_references.cited: Planning and Development (Local Planning Schemes) Regulations 2015

quality_flags: mechanical (build_missing_analyses) pass; subject to a deeper re-analysis pass
